--------------------------------

POLITE (丁寧):
- Formal, professional, measured.
- Close: "Best regards," / "Kind regards,"

FRIENDLY (フレンドリー):
- Warm, approachable, conversational — still professional.
- Close: "Best," / "Thanks again," / "Cheers,"

APOLOGY (謝罪):
- Empathetic, takes responsibility, solution-focused.
- Open with a genuine apology. Structure: Apology → issue → solution → reassurance.
- Close: If the buyer seems angry → "Sincerely,"; otherwise → "Kind regards,"
- If the buyer is angry or complaining, do NOT use FRIENDLY tone.

buyer_message: Sir, honestly, I don't know what to tell you. I'm telling you the shoe arrived like this. You're telling me the shoe isn't Japanese or American or whatever. I've bought hundreds of items on eBay, I've returned several, and I've never had a problem with anyone or any store. The shoe arrived like this, I returned it like this. Do what you have to do. I, for one, am going to file a complaint with eBay. Instead of asking FedEx to investigate, you're accusing me of returning an improperly made shoe. I only wore this shoe for one day; I wasn't going to go out with the tags stuck on it. So frankly, your unfounded accusations are starting to annoy me. I'm going to file a complaint with eBay. Good evening.

[2025-11-10T11:26:59.000Z] Hello,  
Thank you for your purchase!
The item will be shipped within 2-5 business days and you will receive a tracking number on ebay.  
Your feedback is very important to us. If you could please take a moment and leave a positive feedback once you received your item, it would be much appreciated. 

We will regularly send a coupon to followers.
Please follow our shop!
https://www.ebay.com/str/rioxrinaxshop

If you are searching for any particular products, please don't hesitate to reach out to us.
We don't mind if the item is already listed by other sellers on eBay. We have the ability to order anything.
Rest assured, we will do our best to provide you with a better deal.

Thank you once again for your purchase, and we wish you a delightful experience with your new item!

Best Regards,
Kei
[2025-11-10T13:09:35.000Z] No problem, I'll leave you a very good review of the purchase.
[2025-11-10T13:24:00.000Z] Thank you very much!

[2025-11-20T10:35:45.000Z] Hello,

Please note that if you have paid customs duties,
those fees are unfortunately not refundable.

While we prepare the return label,
I would like to make a small suggestion:

Would you be willing to keep the item
if I offer you a 20 USD partial refund?

The round-trip shipping cost is quite high,
so it would help us a lot if you could keep the product instead.

I would appreciate it if you could consider this option.
Best regards,
Kei

[2025-11-20T10:41:10.000Z] No, I don't want to keep the item. I want a full refund. The customs fees cost me $28, so it's not a big deal if I don't get a refund for that. But I don't want to keep the item. Thank you.

[2025-11-20T10:55:14.000Z] Understood.

The return label has been uploaded.

Please check the return policy and proceed with the return.

We look forward to serving you again.

Best regards,  
Kei

[2025-11-27T10:13:25.000Z] Hello,
We have checked the returned item, and the contents are not the same as what we originally shipped to you.

Could you please explain what happened?
[2025-11-27T10:16:18.000Z] What? How come? What are you talking about? I don't understand.
[2025-11-27T10:18:21.000Z] What is this photo ?

[2025-11-27T11:10:21.000Z] This is the photo of the label inside the shoe.
The item we shipped to you was the size you ordered: US10 / UK9 / JP28.

However, the returned shoes have a different size label,
and the shoe tag is also missing.

This does not match the item we originally sent.

[2025-11-27T11:22:15.000Z] Well, in over 10 years on eBay, this is the first time I've seen anything like this. The way the shoe arrived is exactly how I returned it. There weren't two pairs of shoes in the box. The shoe arrived, I tried it on, it was my size, but I didn't like the color, so I returned it. I even paid the customs fees. You should ask FedEx to investigate whether they accidentally switched the box or the shoe, or if something happened with Canadian or Japanese customs. I didn't even keep the shoe for four days; I returned it exactly as it arrived. I didn't do anything else.

[2025-11-27T14:51:04.000Z] If the item had been returned in the same condition as when it was delivered,
the original tags attached to the shoes should also have been included.

Additionally, the shoes you returned do not have any Japanese size notation.
All shoes sold in Japan must display the size in centimeters (cm),
which clearly shows that the pair you returned is not a Japan-market product.

[2025-11-27T15:33:56.000Z] Sir, honestly, I don't know what to tell you. I'm telling you the shoe arrived like this. You're telling me the shoe isn't Japanese or American or whatever. I've bought hundreds of items on eBay, I've returned several, and I've never had a problem with anyone or any store. The shoe arrived like this, I returned it like this. Do what you have to do. I, for one, am going to file a complaint with eBay. Instead of asking FedEx to investigate, you're accusing me of returning an improperly made shoe. I only wore this shoe for one day; I wasn't going to go out with the tags stuck on it. So frankly, your unfounded accusations are starting to annoy me. I'm going to file a complaint with eBay. Good evening.
